ItacPersonItem.Notes: For a short biographical account see Antonino Mongitore, Bibliotheca Sicula, Didaci Bua, Palermo, Vol.I, p. 128 (BL Shelfmark:610.m.10.) For a short referenceto Morabito see Placido Reina, Delle Notizie Historiche Della Città di Messina. Seconda parte. Messina, Bonacota, 1668.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
